response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the Reference JSON for the musical segments. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized Reference JSON for song lyrics; manually transcribed the spoken skit segment as the JSON was null for that section. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied rapid transitions for the upbeat song and the fast-paced reading of the list during the skit to maintain synchronization with vocal bursts.

subtitles.original: Trust me
subtitles.english: Trust me

subtitles.original: 未来へ歩き出そう
subtitles.english: walk into the future,

subtitles.original: そう君のために僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: I exist for your sake.

subtitles.original: I'm here そばにいるから Call me
subtitles.english: I'm here, I'm right next to you, Call me.

subtitles.original: 僕がいるから Trust me
subtitles.english: I'm here, Trust me.

subtitles.original: もう何も恐れないで My dear
subtitles.english: Trust me, there's nothing to be afraid of, my dear.

subtitles.original: 見えない糸で Trust me
subtitles.english: An invisible thread, Trust me,

subtitles.original: 繋がっているから
subtitles.english: is what connects us.

subtitles.original: ただ感じていてこのぬくもり
subtitles.english: So feel my warmth by your side.

subtitles.original: いつまでもそばにいる Forever
subtitles.english: Always by your side, Forever.

subtitles.original: 密まっても離れない Never ever
subtitles.english: No matter what, never letting go, Never ever.

subtitles.original: 君がいれば Whatever you do
subtitles.english: As long as you're here, whatever you do.

subtitles.original: ねえ僕に教えて Whatever you say
subtitles.english: Hey, tell me, whatever you say.

subtitles.original: 辛いことあれば全て飲み込み
subtitles.english: If there are painful things, swallow them all.

subtitles.original: もしそれでも無理ならば Call me call me
subtitles.english: If you still can't handle it, Call me, call me.

subtitles.original: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear
subtitles.english: You're my love, you're my shine, you're my dear.

subtitles.original: 世界的に回しても Trust me
subtitles.english: Even if the world turns against you, Trust me.

subtitles.original: 泣いてみればいい 頼ってみればいい
subtitles.english: Don't hesitate to cry and rely on me.

subtitles.original: その全てを受け止めると決めた
subtitles.english: I decided long ago to accept all your burdens.

subtitles.original: I'm here どこにいたって Call me
subtitles.english: I'm here, wherever you are, Call me.

subtitles.original: 一つになれる Trust me
subtitles.english: We'll be together, Trust me.

subtitles.original: この想い解けないから My dear
subtitles.english: These feelings for you will never change, My dear.

subtitles.original: 抱えた荷物 Trust me
subtitles.english: Those things you're carrying, Trust me,

subtitles.original: 降ろしてみればいい
subtitles.english: just put them down.

subtitles.original: そう君のために僕がいるんだ
subtitles.english: I exist for your sake.

subtitles.original: I'm here そばにいるから Call me
subtitles.english: I'm here, I'm right next to you, Call me.

subtitles.original: 僕がいるから Trust me
subtitles.english: I'm here, Trust me.

subtitles.original: もう何も恐れないで My dear
subtitles.english: Trust me, there's nothing to be afraid of, My dear.

subtitles.original: 見えない糸で Trust me
subtitles.english: An invisible thread, Trust me,

subtitles.original: 繋がっているから
subtitles.english: is what connects us.

subtitles.original: ただ感じていてこのぬくもり
subtitles.english: So feel my warmth by your side.

subtitles.original: With me もう離れないで
subtitles.english: With me, don't leave me.

subtitles.original: Give me その心を開いて
subtitles.english: Give me, open your heart.

subtitles.original: Fill me 全てを伝えて
subtitles.english: Fill me, tell me everything.

subtitles.original: With me 言葉はいらない
subtitles.english: With me, words are not needed.

subtitles.original: Give me 見つめ合えばいい
subtitles.english: Give me, just looking at each other is enough.

subtitles.original: Feel me 全てを受け取って
subtitles.english: Feel me, take everything.

subtitles.original: Trust me yeah baby ooh...
subtitles.english: Trust me, yeah baby ooh...

subtitles.original: ハロー？ 誰かいますか？
subtitles.english: Hello...? Anybody here?

subtitles.original: ホラゲーは結構やってきたけど、何だろうな...
subtitles.english: I have played enough horror games and I don't know why...

subtitles.original: これ、すごい既視感ある。
subtitles.english: ...but it reminds me of something similar.

subtitles.original: 読みます、これ？ 読むか...
subtitles.english: Should I read this? Maybe...

subtitles.original: 何が目的ですか 何でいるんですか
subtitles.english: What is your purpose? Why are you here?

subtitles.original: 切れてますか 怒ってますか
subtitles.english: Are you upset? Are you angry?

subtitles.original: ここにいていいですか 戻ります
subtitles.english: Is it okay for me to be here? I'm going back.

subtitles.original: 帰りましょうか 戻ろうか
subtitles.english: Shall we go home? Shall we turn back?

subtitles.original: 何すればいい 何か手伝えますか
subtitles.english: What should I do? Can I help with anything?

subtitles.original: 敵はありますか 何者ですか
subtitles.english: Is there an enemy? Who are you?

subtitles.original: どこにいますか 近くにいますか
subtitles.english: Where are you? Are you nearby?

subtitles.original: 出てきて アピールしてください
subtitles.english: Come out. Please show yourself.

subtitles.original: もしもし
subtitles.english: Hello?

subtitles.original: あのドア、さっき入ったときのと似てるけど...
subtitles.english: That door looks similar to the entrance door...

subtitles.original: まさか出口？
subtitles.english: Is that the exit?

subtitles.original: それとも罠？
subtitles.english: Or is that a trap?

subtitles.original: ホラゲーだったら...
subtitles.english: Well, if this is a horror game...

subtitles.original: 叫んでみたほうがいいのかな？
subtitles.english: ...should I try to scream?

subtitles.original: ああああああああ！！！！
subtitles.english: AAAAAAAAHHHHHHHH!!!!

subtitles.original: 黙れ！
subtitles.english: Shut up!

subtitles.original: え？
subtitles.english: Eh?

subtitles.original: どれほどの悲しみ君は隠してたの
subtitles.english: How much sadness have you been hiding?

subtitles.original: どれほどの思いを胸に閉じ込めてきたの
subtitles.english: How much of your feelings have you shut in your chest?

subtitles.original: 痛みと引き換えに手に入れた強さを
subtitles.english: The strength exchanged for the pain,

subtitles.original: いつか優しさへ君は変えてゆけるはず
subtitles.english: you should be able to turn it into gentleness one day.

subtitles.original: 誰かの期待にずっと応え
subtitles.english: Always responding to someone's expectations,

subtitles.original: 褒められるのが好きなのですか
subtitles.english: do you like being praised?

subtitles.original: なりたい自分をすり替えても
subtitles.english: Even if you replace the self you want to be,

subtitles.original: 笑顔はいつでも素敵ですか
subtitles.english: is your smile always wonderful?

subtitles.original: 始まりだけ 夢見て起きる
subtitles.english: Only in the beginning, waking up from a dream,

subtitles.original: その先なら いつか自分の腕で
subtitles.english: eventually, beyond that, with your own arms...

subtitles.original: そう大事なものはいつも 形のないもの
subtitles.english: Yes, important things are always formless things.
